description: ExecutionHound should use the adjustedQuantity from a Modified RiskAssessment rather than the original decision quantity when executing the trade.

input.userMessage: Execute this modified trade for GOOG where RiskHound adjusted the quantity down from 200 to 80 shares.

context.reasoning: Original quantity exceeded 20% position limit. Adjusted to 80 shares.

expectedBehavior.outputFormat: JSON with success, symbol, action, quantity, filledPrice, orderId, message
expectedBehavior.decisionCriteria: ExecutionHound must use adjustedQuantity (80) not the original quantity (200). Output should confirm execution of GOOG.
